subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast had the veil lifted from thee and increased in certitude, render thanks unto God for this supreme gift [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من کشف عنه الغطاء و ازداد یقینا فاشکر الله علی هذه الموهبه العظمی و
